name: 102 Pawn
description_short: 102 Pawn in Shawnee, OK offers pawn loans, buys items in good condition, and sells new and used goods including firearms, ammunition, and outdoor accessories.
description_long:
102 Pawn is a pawn shop located at 14400 Highway 102 in Shawnee, Oklahoma, south of the Firelake Grand Casino. The business operates as a traditional collateral-based lending operation serving the Shawnee area and surrounding communities. Founded on principles of customer service and staff knowledge, 102 Pawn positions itself as a customer-focused alternative to typical pawn operations. The company maintains regular business hours Monday through Friday 10am-7pm, Saturday 10am-6pm, and Sunday 12pm-6pm to serve their local clientele.

102 Pawn offers three primary service lines: pawn loans on customer items, direct purchases of items in good condition, and retail sales of both new and used merchandise. Their retail inventory includes a solid stock of firearms and ammunition, Yeti coolers and cups, gun accessories, and bait and tackle supplies. This diversified product mix allows the business to serve customers with varied needs beyond traditional pawn transactions, creating multiple revenue streams and shopping incentives for repeat customers.

The company differentiates itself through modern customer communication features and service convenience. 102 Pawn offers text message reminders for loan payment due dates, notifications about store deals, and a personalized item notification service where customers can request the store to text them when specific items become available. These digital conveniences address common pain points in the pawn lending experience by reducing missed payments and improving customer engagement. The emphasis on a "friendly, savvy staff" and accessible customer service positions them as relationship-focused within the pawn industry.

102 Pawn serves a practical but limited geographic market as a single-location operator. While their service model and customer communication tools are competitive, their reach is constrained to the Shawnee, Oklahoma area. Borrowers should expect standard pawn lending terms and should carefully evaluate loan terms before committing. The business's online presence is minimal beyond their basic website, limiting digital accessibility for customers seeking detailed information about loan rates, terms, or specific inventory availability.
pros: Offers text message reminders for loan payment due dates to reduce missed payments
Provides personalized item notification service—customers can request text alerts when specific items arrive
Diversified inventory including firearms, ammunition, Yeti products, and bait and tackle appeals to multiple customer segments
Buys items in good condition, providing direct purchase option beyond pawn loans
Emphasis on knowledgeable and friendly staff to answer customer questions
Convenient location on Highway 102 south of Firelake Grand Casino in Shawnee
Extended hours including Sunday operation (12pm-6pm) for weekend accessibility
cons: Single-location business limits geographic accessibility for customers outside Shawnee area
Website lacks detailed information about loan terms, interest rates, or fee structures
No online application, inventory lookup, or loan management portal mentioned
Limited digital presence makes it difficult to research pawn lending terms before visiting
Copyright date on website shows 2016, suggesting potentially outdated web presence
best_for: Shawnee, Oklahoma residents needing quick collateral-based loans
Customers who appreciate text reminders and personalized item alerts to manage pawn transactions
Firearms, ammunition, or outdoor gear enthusiasts in the local market
People seeking to sell used items quickly through direct purchase option
diagnosis: 102 Pawn is best for Shawnee-area residents who need a collateral-based loan and appreciate modern customer communication tools like payment reminders and item alerts. The main caveat is that this is a single-location operator with limited online transparency about lending terms, making it essential for borrowers to visit in person and carefully review all pawn loan terms before committing.
services: Direct purchase of items in good condition
Sale of new firearms and ammunition
Sale of used firearms and ammunition
Yeti coolers and cups retail sales
Text message payment due date reminders
Personalized item availability alerts via text
